updates.title: UK inflation jumps to 3.3% in March as Iran war sends fuel prices to highest rise since Ukraine invasion
updates.summary: UK inflation rose to 3.3% in March due to surging energy costs from the Iran war. Motor fuel prices jumped 8.7%, while services inflation unexpectedly increased to 4.5%. This inflation outlook may impact interest rates, with economists now expecting a prolonged pause in rate hikes.

updates.title: Stock market losses can ease your tax burden if you don’t ignore this crucial caveat
updates.summary: Capital losses on listed shares can be set off against capital gains within the same financial year. Unutilised losses can be carried forward for up to eight years, provided ITR is filed on time. Here's what the process looks like.

updates.summary: Gold and silver prices rose over 1% on 22 April as safe-haven demand increased after President Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran.
